rationale: In the citing paper, Heilman et al. (2002) appears only as part of a grouped citation in the General Discussion, where the authors note that prior work shows windfall gains can increase spending. The paper does not discuss Heilman et al.'s mechanisms, design, or findings in detail, and it is not used to build specific hypotheses, measures, or analyses in the current studies. Its role is broad background support rather than a direct conceptual or methodological dependency.
